_schemaDescription: Risk Assessment – Audit Universe & Entity sample payload. 1 entity total, 1 scored. Category: High Risk/Monthly (1 entity). 0 unscored entities. Control weakness derived from inherent × residual risk category per entity. Category labels and audit frequency mappings are client-configured (not hardcoded).

_controlWeaknessRef.Weak controls: Inherent High + Residual High — controls not reducing risk
_controlWeaknessRef.Strong controls: Inherent High + Residual Low — controls working well
_controlWeaknessRef.Low-risk area: Inherent Low + Residual Low — inherently low risk, well managed
_controlWeaknessRef.Control failure / anomaly: Inherent Low + Residual High — unexpected high residual despite low inherent risk

priorityEntities.description: Top entity by residual score requiring immediate audit attention.
